narrative:
Loveland City has 9,637 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.1 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +1.1% D−R vs -27.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
